# services.go-csp-collector

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.go-csp-collector`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.go-csp-collector.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable go-csp-collector, a content security policy violation collector. |
| `services.go-csp-collector.package` | `package` | The go-csp-collector package to use. |
| `services.go-csp-collector.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of (boolean or absolute path or string)` | Settings for go-csp-collector. See <https://github.com/jacobbednarz/go-csp-collector> for supported options. |
| `services.go-csp-collector.settings.output-format` | `one of "text", "json"` | Define how the violation reports are formatted for output. |
| `services.go-csp-collector.settings.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port to listen on. |
